title: Exchange of Notes between the Government of the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and the Government of Japan concerning the Convention between the United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland and Japan for the Avoidance of the Double Taxation and the Prevention of Fiscal Evasion with respect to the Taxes on Income and on Capital Gains, signed at London on 2 February 2006, and the Protocol Amending the Convention, signed at London on 17 December 2013
subject: TAXATION
